name: X MCP Server
description: Connects AI assistants to the X (Twitter) API via an official hosted MCP server. Exposes 200+ read-only endpoints for post search, timeline reads, profile lookups, and trend analysis. No write access.

skills.name: Post Search
skills.description: Searches public X posts and returns matching results with author, engagement, and timestamp metadata for analysis.

skills.name: Timeline Reads
skills.description: Reads a user's home and profile timelines using their own account permissions granted through OAuth authorization.

skills.name: Trend Analysis
skills.description: Surfaces trending topics and conversation activity so agents can monitor real-time signals on the platform.
